emails.subject: Re: Smurfit Stone Containerboard 3 month extension attached
emails.subject_base: Smurfit Stone Containerboard 3 month extension attached
emails.body: Re: Smurfit Stone Containerboard 3 month extension attached We are going to use our contract for the 3 month deal, so what you have given me is fine for that. For the longer term deal, they want to start with their contract. So, please review it over the next few weeks to be ready for their next deal starting Feb 1. Thanks Chris Dan J Hyvl 10/30/2000 07:55 AM

emails.subject: Smurfit Stone Containerboard 3 month extension attached
emails.subject_base: Smurfit Stone Containerboard 3 month extension attached
emails.body: Smurfit Stone Containerboard 3 month extension attached Chris, The above document is the November 17, 1999 document which has been changed to a 3 month deal with the price change you specified. I have received the copy of the type of contract that they would like us to use. I note that we will have to make a lot of changes which is probably not warranted for a 3 month deal. If you want us to consider using their form for a long term deal, I will start making the necessary changes and send you back a red-lined single transaction contract. Will the long term deal have the same terms as our last long term deal except for price?
